title: Mandeep Singh
content:
Mandeep Singh - AI/ML Engineer & Full Stack Developer
Bio: Pursuing M.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at Chandigarh University. I architect intelligent systems at the intersection of AI research and production engineering. From training neural networks to deploying cloud-native applications, I build things that matter.
Location: Bhiwani, Haryana, India
Roles: AI/ML Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Cloud Architect, Data Scientist, Flutter Developer
Available for work: Yes

title: Covid-19 ML Predictor
content:
Project: Covid-19 ML Predictor
Description: ML model predicting COVID-19 case trends using regression and time-series analysis.
Details: Built a machine learning pipeline using Python, Scikit-learn, and Pandas to analyze and predict COVID-19 case trajectories. Implemented data preprocessing, feature engineering, and multiple regression models with cross-validation.
Technology Stack: Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib

original.title: Covid-19 ML Predictor
original.description: ML model predicting COVID-19 case trends using regression and time-series analysis.
original.longDesc: Built a machine learning pipeline using Python, Scikit-learn, and Pandas to analyze and predict COVID-19 case trajectories. Implemented data preprocessing, feature engineering, and multiple regression models with cross-validation.

title: Celestial Bodies Database
content:
Project: Celestial Bodies Database
Description: Relational database system for astronomical data using PostgreSQL and Bash scripting.
Details: Designed a full PostgreSQL database schema for celestial bodies including galaxies, stars, planets, and moons. Used Bash scripting for data ingestion automation, complex SQL queries, and reporting.
Technology Stack: PostgreSQL, Bash, SQL, Linux

original.title: Celestial Bodies Database

original.longDesc: Designed a full PostgreSQL database schema for celestial bodies including galaxies, stars, planets, and moons. Used Bash scripting for data ingestion automation, complex SQL queries, and reporting.

title: Technozarre App
content:
Project: Technozarre App
Description: Lead-architected Flutter mobile app for college fest event registrations.
Details: Served as Lead Architect for a Flutter mobile application enabling students to register for college technical fest events. Implemented real-time updates via Socket.IO, integrated REST APIs, and delivered a polished cross-platform UX.
Technology Stack: Flutter, Dart, Socket.IO, REST API

title: Technozarre Website
content:
Project: Technozarre Website
Description: Official college technical fest website with event listings and a registration system.
Details: Designed and developed the official website for Technozarre, the annual technical fest. Built with modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring event details, registration forms, schedule management, and responsive design.
Technology Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Responsive Design

title: Flutter Chat App
content:
Project: Flutter Chat App
Description: Real-time cross-platform chat application with Socket.IO and live messaging.
Details: Built a fully functional real-time chat application using Flutter and Dart. Integrated Socket.IO for bi-directional event-based communication, REST API for user authentication, and a clean modern UI.
Technology Stack: Flutter, Dart, Socket.IO, API

title: AI Fitness Trainer
content:
Project: AI Fitness Trainer
Description: Computer vision-based AI fitness coach with real-time pose detection and feedback.
Details: Developed an AI fitness trainer using Python, OpenCV, and MediaPipe for real-time pose estimation and exercise tracking. Features voice feedback, rep counting, and a Streamlit dashboard.
Technology Stack: Python, OpenCV, MediaPipe, Streamlit, Computer Vision
